content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Mixed tape: power/FMCG/banks showing relative strength but IT sector broken (HCLTECH -10%, INFY -4.6% pre-results). VIX elevated at 18.65 signaling event risk. Portfolio already 79% deployed with only ~INR 14.5k remaining deployable headroom — default disposition is position management, not new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24134,
      "nifty_resistance": 24310
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.00,
      "new_target": 88.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position down 4.4%. However fundamentals are strong (Q4 PAT +35% YoY, GNPA 1.45%, NNPA 0.13%, advances +21.7%), PSU bank index outperforming, and today showing +3.77% recovery. Set SL at 74 (just below recent swing low ~72-73 zone, ~5.5% below entry, within allowed range) and target 88 (near 52w high + breakout extension). Risk-reward ~1.4:1 from current but thesis intact; giving it room to recover."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 940.00,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Up 11% today on strong Q4 (PAT +19% YoY, GNPA below 1% first time ever, FY26 record PAT). Analyst TP Rs 1143. Trail SL to 940 (just below yesterday's close / breakout level) to protect gains while letting trend run. Target 1100 (near 52w high 1141). Strongest single-name momentum in the book."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 118.00,
      "new_target": 135.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge remains valid given VIX 18.65, weak INR, geopolitical risk. Marginally negative but within normal noise. SL 118 below 20SMA 121.92 with buffer (~5.5% below entry). Target 135 toward recent consolidation highs."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1620.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Up 3% with +5.9% today, 2.3x volume, fresh 52w high breakout. Trail SL to 1620 (just below entry, locks in near-breakeven). Target 1820 (~10% upside, Q4 results 13-May catalyst). Power theme strong; Nabha Power acquisition additive."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1355.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Breakout to fresh 52w high on Q4 beat (+27% PAT, double-digit volume growth). SL 1355 (~4% below entry, below today's low ~1382 with buffer). Target 1500. Best-in-class FMCG in weak sector — defensive + growth."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1005.00,
      "new_target": 1150.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Breakout to fresh 52w high today +5.8%. Q4 audited results 27-Apr (4 days). Scarcity value post Ujjivan rejection for universal bank transition. SL 1005 (~4% below entry, below prior resistance turned support 1000). Target 1150 (near analyst max range). Risk-reward ~2:1."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 645.00,
      "new_target": 760.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Pharma institutional accumulation (3.7x volume). Q4 results 29-Apr is binary event. SL 645 (~5% below entry, below 20SMA 625 buffer). Target 760 near broker consensus. Will re-evaluate before 29-Apr result."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2270.00,
      "new_target": 2550.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "FMCG defensive bounce +6.22%. Q4 results 30-Apr catalyst. SL 2270 (~4.3% below entry, below 2-day prior close). Target 2550 near analyst mid-band. Modest conviction given Q3 core PAT -30% risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 388.00,
      "new_target": 435.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "PSU power, breakout structure, EDF nuclear MoU, ESG upgrade, 33-year dividend track record. Marginally negative today but thesis intact. SL 388 below Support 1 389 with buffer (~4% below entry). Target 435 near analyst upper band. Q4 results 15-May catalyst."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 202.00,
      "new_target": 235.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Fresh ATH, +35% MoM. Q4 concall 29-Apr. Shooting star candle yesterday suggests near-term exhaustion risk. Tight SL 202 (~5.6% below entry, below today's low 212 is too tight given volatility). Target 235. Power cluster exposure (TORNTPOWER + NTPC + ADANIPOWER + TORNTPOWER-ish CESC watch) is already full — NO additions to this cluster."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 print strong, PSU bank theme intact, today recovering. Give the trade room to work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 940.00,
      "reasoning": "Strongest performer; trail SL to lock gains while letting breakout extend."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 118.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; VIX elevated; keep position."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1620.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail to near-breakeven after 3% gain and fresh 52w high breakout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1355.00,
      "reasoning": "Breakout to ATH on earnings beat; keep SL reasonable below today's low."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1005.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results in 4 days; thesis strong. Monitor through 27-Apr."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 645.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results 29-Apr; will reassess pre-event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2270.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive FMCG; Q4 results 30-Apr."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 388.00,
      "reasoning": "Base-on-base structure intact; dividend stalwart."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 202.00,
      "reasoning": "Shooting star warns near-term pullback risk; SL below 200 psychological level."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "PIRAMALFIN, CESC, IEX, DATAPATTNS, ELECON, DEEPAKNTR, DRREDDY, AUROPHARMA — all interesting momentum but NO entries: portfolio at 79% deployed, remaining deployable only INR 14.5k, and power cluster already near saturation (TORNTPOWER + NTPC + ADANIPOWER). HCLTECH falling knife — avoid. INFY Q4 today post-market — reassess tomorrow. CIPLA is BEARISH per research (down 20% YTD, gRevlimid cliff) — skip.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is concentrated across Power (3 names: TORNTPOWER ~6%, NTPC ~5%, ADANIPOWER ~5% = ~16% cluster — approaching limit), Banking/Financials (MAHABANK + PNBHOUSING + AUBANK ~27% — near 35% sector cap), FMCG (NESTLEIND + HINDUNILVR ~17%), Pharma (GRANULES ~5%), Commodity hedge (GOLDBEES ~5%). No new buys appropriate — focus is pure position management. Multiple Q4 result events next 7 days (AUBANK 27-Apr, ADANIPOWER/GRANULES 29-Apr, HINDUNILVR 30-Apr) — will need to decide pre-event whether to trim or hold through. All SLs now properly set (broker had null SLs — this fixes the critical risk gap)."
}
